caption: In a large, brightly lit banquet hall with high ceilings and ornate chandeliers, a man dressed in blue traditional clothing performs a martial arts demonstration. He stands on a wide, blue carpeted area in front of an audience of people seated at long tables draped in red cloth. In the beginning, the man stands still, holding a long staff vertically. As the sequence progresses, he lifts the staff and begins a series of dynamic movements. He transitions from a standing position to a wider stance, swinging the staff across his body in a fluid motion. The audience members, dressed in a variety of formal and semi-formal attire, watch the performance from their seats along the perimeter of the room. The background features neutral-toned walls and architectural pillars, while the overall lighting remains consistent throughout the demonstration.
